logline.ko: 궤도 정거장의 신호. 당신의 선택이 밤을 바갈다.
logline.en: A signal on the orbital station. Your choices reshape the night.
A harbor where tides deliver lost love letters.
Letters that are read before they arrive.
A courier of justice in the neon slums.
A greenhouse where time blooms like flowers.
One final performance before the world goes silent.
A blade-forged knight risen from ruins.
Surveillance feeds that steal memories.

logline.ko: 행성 사이를 오가는 달콤한 우주 편지.
logline.en: Sweet letters drifting between tiny planets.
Write a wish; the letter tears the sky.
Pre-human code pulsing from the abyss.
Court intrigue behind the velvet curtain.
Each raindrop rewinds one day.
Deleted voices still resonate in the tunnel.
Escape across a scorched frontier world.
A summer reunion with your reflected self.

titles.ja: フラクタル・ドリーム

logline.en: A simulation of endlessly repeating dreams.
The last flame mage of a fallen kingdom.
A first dance at a floating concert.
A library of forbidden case files.
A martial pilgrimage to a floating temple.
Secret duels where blades are made of petals.

logline.ko: 영구 동토 아래 숨은 도시의 AI.
logline.en: An AI awakening beneath the permafrost city.
A formula to hold a family together with math and cooking.
A girl mapping streets that exist only on the moon.
Another identity behind the azure wedding veil.

logline.ko: 완벽한 마을의 TV 잡음 속 진실.
logline.en: Truth hidden in the static of a perfect town.
A miniature dragon hidden in the city back alleys.

logline.ko: 두 AI가 함께 쓴 교향곡의 버그.
logline.en: A symphony co-written by two AIs—now glitching.
A name that appears on the window each winter.
A pitch-black tent that opens only at midnight.

logline.ko: 다른 세계의 자신이 쓴 책만 판다.
logline.en: A shop that sells books written by your other selves.

logline.ko: 번개 속에서만 피는 꽃을 지키는 자.
logline.en: Guardians of flowers that bloom only in lightning.
Growing up in a town where time runs backward.
The owner of a passport that vanished at customs.

titles.ja: スターフルーツカフェ

logline.ko: 별 모양 과일이 인연을 맺어주는 곳.
logline.en: Where star-shaped fruit pairs destined lovers.
The first festival on a planet of shifting gravity.
A comic kingdom where spoken words become real.

titles.ja: アフターグロウ・タクシー

logline.en: A driver who only picks up passengers at sunset.

logline.ko: 살아 있는 산호가 기록한 바다의 역사.
logline.en: Living coral archiving the ocean's history.
A bakery that opens only at 3 a.m.
Someone who returns with every high tide.
Records of a city buried beneath the planters.
A gang of kids chasing falling stars.
Blueprints for houses built in the sky.
A room where spoken words physically return.
A courier who runs on beams of light.
A brother's voice returning from the forest.
A criminal's face trapped inside a gemstone.

logline.ko: 사탕 행성을 도는 두 우주인의 데이트.
logline.en: A date orbiting a planet made of candy.
Letters from Titan, delivered eighty years late.
Prayers after the forest became a cathedral.
Confession in a cybernetic cathedral.
Memories trapped in keys after the fire.
At 4 a.m., every lie becomes believable.
A crack in reality where 8-bit flowers grow.
A contract with one who lends the northern lights.

logline.ko: 불꽃이 식기 전에 적을 베는 자.
logline.en: Strike the foe before the embers die.
Lovers on a glass isle visible only at high tide.
A village where trees share human emotions.
Broken satellites raining from the sky.

logline.ko: 칠판에 쓴 꿈이 거리를 점령할 때.
logline.en: When dreams on the chalkboard occupy the streets.
A murder maze laid like piano keys.
Murder warnings that arrive with each lightning bolt.
An alley market selling lost angel halos.
When the machines of a dead factory play again.
What she found in the deep was not a pearl.
A dead station's signal comes back on air.
A dimensional gate drawn with spices.
Passengers on a midnight train with no terminus.
The day figures in paintings go on strike.
A sword style that cuts the noon sun.
A quantum server hidden beneath the lotus pond.
Forgotten fables packed in dusty boxes.
An invitation from an invisible fiancé.
Generations singing on a volcanic isle.
A city reflected in the desert is a vanished hometown.
An artificial mind reset at every sunrise.
An industrial zone that mass-produces secrets.
Awakening of an ancient jade army.
A confession delivered whenever it snows.
Kings whispering from inside amber tombs.
A guilty verdict delivered by the lake itself.
Flowers blooming from urban electric surges.
A library storing memories at light speed.
Tracking the day silk devoured the streets.

logline.ko: 우주 정거장에서 굽는 첫 웨딩 케이크.
logline.en: The first wedding cake baked on a space station.
An ER that operates with magical runes.
A promise reblooming from a burnt flower shop.
